incorrects.description: Student selected 30. They may have read the lower gridline instead of estimating between lines.

steps.text: Team A's bar goes past 30. Look where the top ends. It's between two lines.

incorrects.description: Student selected 34. They may have estimated but not recognized the halfway position.

steps.text: Look at Team A's bar. It ends exactly halfway between 30 and 40. What number is halfway between those?

incorrects.description: Student selected 40. They may have read the upper gridline instead of estimating between lines.

steps.text: Team A's bar doesn't reach 40. Look where it ends. It's between the 30 line and the 40 line.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Team A bar highlights and value label appears showing 35.

steps.text: Let me show you how to read this. Team A's bar ends between 30 and 40. It ends exactly halfway between them. Halfway between 30 and 40 is 35. When a bar ends between two lines, find where it is between those numbers. The answer is 35.
